weather.summary: Saturday: 14°C, broken clouds. Sunday: 11°C, light rain

metadata.greeting: This weekend offers a fantastic mix of indoor and outdoor fun for your little one! From exploring spring artworks at Camden Market to getting hands-on at the Science Museum's Wonderlab, there's something for every interest and energy level. Don't miss the chance to explore the Horniman Museum and Gardens - just be aware that the gardens are closed on Saturday, April 4th!

activities.title: Camden Market Easter Weekender
activities.description: Roar into Spring! Explore 3D artworks, craft bonnets, plant spring seeds, enjoy face painting, and rave with Cheeky Meeky. The Easter Garden is open in Hawley Wharf and Waterside Halls.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on activities, street performers, and a fun Easter theme will keep a 3-year-old entertained.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Camden Road, or the Underground to Camden Town.
transport.tip: The market can get crowded, so arrive early!

activities.title: V&A Museum of Childhood (Young V&A)
activities.description: Explore interactive galleries designed specifically for children, with toys, games, and objects relating to childhood.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on exhibits and a dedicated under 2s space (Mini Museum) provide sensory experiences ideal for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Central Line to Bethnal Green.
transport.tip: Avoid peak hours for a more relaxed visit.

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: Meet farm animals, see fresh veggies growing, and enjoy a cafe. A perfect family day out in the city.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, open space, and a relaxed atmosphere are great for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Walk, cycle, or take a local bus.
transport.tip: Check for special events or workshops on their website.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Two floors of immersive play space known as the Story Worlds as well as the Story Garden playground.
activities.whyItWorks: Immersive play spaces and a Story Garden playground offer active fun.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground or Central Line to Stratford.

activities.title: Victoria Park Splash Pool
activities.description: Popular summer attraction featuring fountains, water jets, and splash pads designed for children.
activities.whyItWorks: Water play is always a hit with toddlers, especially on a warm day.

transport.fromHackney: Walk, cycle, or take a local bus.

activities.title: Clissold Park
activities.description: Features a splash pad with interactive water jets and fountains that are part of a larger, family-friendly park that includes playgrounds and animal enclosures.
activities.whyItWorks: A mix of water play, playground, and animal encounters provides diverse entertainment.

transport.fromHackney: Take a local bus.
transport.tip: Check for opening times of the splash pad.

activities.title: Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park
activities.description: Explore the park's lovely play spaces.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of space to run around and play.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Central Line to Stratford.
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the park.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaur skeletons, fascinating exhibits, and participate in family-friendly activities. The Easter Family Festival runs until April 20.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaur-themed hunts and hands-on science experiments are engaging for young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground (Central Line to South Kensington).
transport.tip: Book a free timed entry ticket in advance.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Discover how the world works with interactive exhibits. Visit the Wonderlab for hands-on experiments.
activities.whyItWorks: The Wonderlab offers a great hands-on experience with experiment demonstrations, talks, activities and educational play zones.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground (Central Line to South Kensington).

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: A small zoo in the Hampstead Heath area, home to rare species of birds and animals like wallabies and lemurs.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry and a variety of animals make it an affordable and engaging day out.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Hampstead Heath, then a bus.
transport.tip: Combine with a picnic in Hampstead Heath.

activities.title: Diana Memorial Playground
activities.description: A magical, Peter Pan-themed playground featuring a large wooden pirate ship, teepees, and sensory trails.
activities.whyItWorks: The pirate ship and sensory trails offer imaginative and active play.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Central Line to Notting Hill Gate or Queensway.
transport.tip: Arrive early, as it can get crowded.

activities.title: British Museum
activities.description: Explore world history and culture with activity backpacks, puzzles, and games.
activities.whyItWorks: Activity backpacks and trails make the museum engaging for young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Central Line to Holborn or Tottenham Court Road.
transport.tip: Book a free entrance ticket in advance.

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace - Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt
activities.description: Roam through lush gardens, searching for elusive Lindt GOLD BUNNY statues.
activities.whyItWorks: The combination of royal history, spring flowers, and family-friendly events makes this an ideal destination for students, locals, and visitors during Easter.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Waterloo, then a train to Hampton Court.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: Scenic escape with lush gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds, and a mini zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Families can enjoy informal Easter egg hunts, picnics, or just a relaxing walk through this inner-city green space.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Victoria, then a bus.
transport.tip: Check for events happening in the park.

activities.title: Paddington The Musical
activities.description: Welcome the world's most beloved bear to the stage!
activities.whyItWorks: Charming story and songs that appeal to young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Covent Garden or Charing Cross.

activities.title: The Lion King
activities.description: An immensely successful reimagining of Disney's animation that continues to captivate audiences.
activities.whyItWorks: The spectacular visuals and familiar story make it a great experience for older toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Covent Garden.

activities.title: Matilda The Musical
activities.description: A feel-good children's theatre show that's been praised by critics and audiences alike.
activities.whyItWorks: Entertaining songs and an inspiring story.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Covent Garden or Leicester Square.

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers at Hobbledown Heath
activities.description: Follow the themed egg trail, climb and explore across indoor and outdoor play, and meet animals along the way.
activities.whyItWorks: A combination of animals, play areas and a fun Easter theme.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Hounslow West, then a bus.

activities.title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar Trail at Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: Discover a variety of illustrated animals nestled amongst the blooming habitats of the reserve, identify the letter on each one and complete the secret word in the activity booklet.
activities.whyItWorks: A nature-based activity that is fun and educational.

transport.fromHackney: Take a bus.

activities.title: Luminarium: Myriad at Woolwich Works
activities.description: Fun family events including Drag Queen Storytime, Dan of All Tricks and more.
activities.whyItWorks: A unique experience that is engaging for both adults and children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the DLR to Woolwich Arsenal.

activities.title: War Horse
activities.description: Based on Michael Morpurgo's heartbreaking novel, its breathtaking fusion of drama and innovative puppetry is a masterpiece of modern theatre.
activities.whyItWorks: A high quality theatre production that has proven to be immensely successful.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Underground to Waterloo or Embankment.
